name: What if my boss in Salt Lake City is mad I filed workers comp and cuts my hours?
description: Illegal—report to Utah Labor Commission; fines up to $5k.[1]

mainEntity.name: What if my boss in Salt Lake City is mad I filed workers comp and cuts my hours?

acceptedAnswer.text: Illegal—report to Utah Labor Commission; fines up to $5k.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: **That's illegal retaliation; Utah bans intimidation to block claims, with up to $5,000 fines.** Report to Labor Commission.[1][2] Key factors: Protects filing rights; document harassment. File complaint, keep job search records if terminated. Seek legal help to enforce anti-retaliation laws.
